system.effect: Seal will stall a maintained Spiritual spell in someone, making it impossible for the target to be freed from its effects. This enchantment is used on Spiritual spells previously cast successfully on an individual who failed the Resistance Check. In this way, the affected character loses all ability to make another MR Check, regardless of general rules or what the spell itself dictates, until the Spiritual spell itself is destroyed or maintenance is discontinued. Seal has no effect upon non-maintenance spells or those restricted to a specific area. The affected enchantments must have a Zeonic value of 100 or below.
